subtitle.ja: 左手の親指と小指に糸をかけて始めます。右手のひらを上にして輪の中に入れ、右手人差し指と親指に糸をかけます
subtitle.en: Begin with the string looped on the left thumb and little finger. Insert the right hand, palm up, into the loop, and pick up the string onto the right thumb and index finger.

subtitle.ja: 右手中指と薬指を閉じて親指で押さえ、右手首を半回転させます
subtitle.en: Bring the right middle and ring fingers together, press them with the right thumb, and turn the right wrist half a turn.

subtitle.ja: 左手の人差し指で、右手の甲の糸を取って完成です
subtitle.en: With the left index finger, pick up the string from the back of the right hand to complete the figure.
